mapper.select: SELECT pd_code, lot_no, main_bcf_hogi, main_tf_hogi, pdf_path, status, DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reg_date FROM TB_PROD_DATA WHERE reg_date BETWEEN CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') ORDER BY pd_code DESC
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(lot_no, 7) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM TB_PROD_DATA WHERE LEFT(lot_no, 6) = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%y%m%d')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_PROD_DATA ( lot_no, main_auto_pattern_number, main_yn, main_bcf_pattern_number, main_tf_pattern_number, main_bcf_hogi, main_tf_hogi, main_spare_1, main_spare_2, main_spare_3, main_spare_4, main_bigo_1, main_bigo_2, main_bigo_3, main_bigo_4, main_bigo_5,
upper_auto_pattern_number, upper_yn, upper_bcf_pattern_number, upper_tf_pattern_number, upper_bcf_hogi, upper_tf_hogi, upper_spare_1, upper_spare_2, upper_spare_3, upper_spare_4, upper_bigo_1, upper_bigo_2, upper_bigo_3, upper_bigo_4, upper_bigo_5,
lower_auto_pattern_number, lower_yn, lower_bcf_pattern_number, lower_tf_pattern_number, lower_bcf_hogi, lower_tf_hogi, lower_spare_1, lower_spare_2, lower_spare_3, lower_spare_4, lower_bigo_1, lower_bigo_2, lower_bigo_3, lower_bigo_4, lower_bigo_5,
belt_auto_pattern_number, belt_yn, belt_bcf_pattern_number, belt_tf_pattern_number, belt_bcf_hogi, belt_tf_hogi, belt_spare_1, belt_spare_2, belt_spare_3, belt_spare_4, belt_bigo_1, belt_bigo_2, belt_bigo_3, belt_bigo_4, belt_bigo_5,
status, reg_date, reg_user ) VALUES ( #{lot_no}, #{main_auto_pattern_number}, #{main_yn}, #{main_bcf_pattern_number}, #{main_tf_pattern_number}, #{main_bcf_hogi}, #{main_tf_hogi}, #{main_spare_1}, #{main_spare_2}, #{main_spare_3}, #{main_spare_4}, #{main_bigo_1}, #{main_bigo_2}, #{main_bigo_3}, #{main_bigo_4}, #{main_bigo_5},
#{upper_auto_pattern_number}, #{upper_yn}, #{upper_bcf_pattern_number}, #{upper_tf_pattern_number}, #{upper_bcf_hogi}, #{upper_tf_hogi}, #{upper_spare_1}, #{upper_spare_2}, #{upper_spare_3}, #{upper_spare_4}, #{upper_bigo_1}, #{upper_bigo_2}, #{upper_bigo_3}, #{upper_bigo_4}, #{upper_bigo_5},
#{lower_auto_pattern_number}, #{lower_yn}, #{lower_bcf_pattern_number}, #{lower_tf_pattern_number}, #{lower_bcf_hogi}, #{lower_tf_hogi}, #{lower_spare_1}, #{lower_spare_2}, #{lower_spare_3}, #{lower_spare_4}, #{lower_bigo_1}, #{lower_bigo_2}, #{lower_bigo_3}, #{lower_bigo_4}, #{lower_bigo_5},
#{belt_auto_pattern_number}, #{belt_yn}, #{belt_bcf_pattern_number}, #{belt_tf_pattern_number}, #{belt_bcf_hogi}, #{belt_tf_hogi}, #{belt_spare_1}, #{belt_spare_2}, #{belt_spare_3}, #{belt_spare_4}, #{belt_bigo_1}, #{belt_bigo_2}, #{belt_bigo_3}, #{belt_bigo_4}, #{belt_bigo_5},
'WAIT', NOW(), #{reg_user} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_PROD_DATA SET main_auto_pattern_number = #{main_auto_pattern_number}, main_yn = #{main_yn}, main_bcf_pattern_number = #{main_bcf_pattern_number}, main_tf_pattern_number = #{main_tf_pattern_number}, main_bcf_hogi = #{main_bcf_hogi}, main_tf_hogi = #{main_tf_hogi}, main_spare_1 = #{main_spare_1}, main_spare_2 = #{main_spare_2}, main_spare_3 = #{main_spare_3}, main_spare_4 = #{main_spare_4}, main_bigo_1 = #{main_bigo_1}, main_bigo_2 = #{main_bigo_2}, main_bigo_3 = #{main_bigo_3}, main_bigo_4 = #{main_bigo_4}, main_bigo_5 = #{main_bigo_5},
upper_auto_pattern_number = #{upper_auto_pattern_number}, upper_yn = #{upper_yn}, upper_bcf_pattern_number = #{upper_bcf_pattern_number}, upper_tf_pattern_number = #{upper_tf_pattern_number}, upper_bcf_hogi = #{upper_bcf_hogi}, upper_tf_hogi = #{upper_tf_hogi}, upper_spare_1 = #{upper_spare_1}, upper_spare_2 = #{upper_spare_2}, upper_spare_3 = #{upper_spare_3}, upper_spare_4 = #{upper_spare_4}, upper_bigo_1 = #{upper_bigo_1}, upper_bigo_2 = #{upper_bigo_2}, upper_bigo_3 = #{upper_bigo_3}, upper_bigo_4 = #{upper_bigo_4}, upper_bigo_5 = #{upper_bigo_5},
lower_auto_pattern_number = #{lower_auto_pattern_number}, lower_yn = #{lower_yn}, lower_bcf_pattern_number = #{lower_bcf_pattern_number}, lower_tf_pattern_number = #{lower_tf_pattern_number}, lower_bcf_hogi = #{lower_bcf_hogi}, lower_tf_hogi = #{lower_tf_hogi}, lower_spare_1 = #{lower_spare_1}, lower_spare_2 = #{lower_spare_2}, lower_spare_3 = #{lower_spare_3}, lower_spare_4 = #{lower_spare_4}, lower_bigo_1 = #{lower_bigo_1}, lower_bigo_2 = #{lower_bigo_2}, lower_bigo_3 = #{lower_bigo_3}, lower_bigo_4 = #{lower_bigo_4}, lower_bigo_5 = #{lower_bigo_5},
belt_auto_pattern_number = #{belt_auto_pattern_number}, belt_yn = #{belt_yn}, belt_bcf_pattern_number = #{belt_bcf_pattern_number}, belt_tf_pattern_number = #{belt_tf_pattern_number}, belt_bcf_hogi = #{belt_bcf_hogi}, belt_tf_hogi = #{belt_tf_hogi}, belt_spare_1 = #{belt_spare_1}, belt_spare_2 = #{belt_spare_2}, belt_spare_3 = #{belt_spare_3}, belt_spare_4 = #{belt_spare_4}, belt_bigo_1 = #{belt_bigo_1}, belt_bigo_2 = #{belt_bigo_2}, belt_bigo_3 = #{belt_bigo_3}, belt_bigo_4 = #{belt_bigo_4}, belt_bigo_5 = #{belt_bigo_5} WHERE pd_code = #{pd_code}
